name: Shion Karanomori
description:
__Height:__ 168 cm (5'6")

An analyst in the Public Safety Bureau's General Analysis Division and a latent criminal as well. She provides backup to the Enforcers and Inspectors in their investigation by analyzing the data and evidence sent by them.   She is in a relationship with Yayoi Kunizuka who is one of the enforcers of Unit 1.  (Source: Wikipedia)
